headline: Hegseth 🛳️💥 Locks Full Boat BBQ Vid from Congress Cucks 😤🔒
text:
Pete Hegseth 🪖🍆, Trump's Defense DADDY 👨‍💼🔥, just DROPPED the TEA ☕💦 after classified Senate simp sesh 🤫📜: ONLY 'appropriate' congressional committees 👥🕵️‍♂️ get the THICC, unedited TOP-SECRET VID 🎥🚫 of that SEPT 2 Caribbean BOAT STRIKE BBQ 💥🛥️ – no public YEET for you plebs! 😩🙅‍♂️ Marco Rubio 🌴🇨🇺, State Sec SLAYER 💅, tag-teamed the briefing on Trump admin's AIR STRIKES 🚀💣 on alleged VENEZUELAN DRUG BOATS 🛳️💊 hauling FENTANYL POISON 🍬☠️ to MURICA! GOP bros 🐘💪 like Rick Scott 🐊 & Lindsey Graham 😎🪖 screaming 'KEEP BLASTING 👊🔥 – Maduro's gotta GTFO or GITTY UP TO PRISON ⛓️🇻🇪!' while Dem snowflakes ❄️😢 like Chuck Schumer 🤓 & Adam Schiff 🕵️‍♂️ whine 'SHOW US THE FULL CLIP 🎬 or we don't TRUST YA transparency! 🤥📹'

Hours BEFORE Capitol chaos 🏛️😵, US MIL 💥 announced PACIFIC OCEAN BOAT SMACKDOWN 🌊🛳️ killing 8 more narco simps – BRRRR 😤💨! Hegseth spilling: House/Senate Armed Services Committees 🪖📋 get the RAW 9/2 FOOTAGE Wednesday, but 'longstanding DoD policy' says NO PUBLIC DROP 📴🚫 of that classified GOLD 🏆. New bill? House PASSED mandating PENTAGON hand over UNEDITED STRIKE VIDS to Southern Command LATAM/Caribbean cartels 🏝️💰 – Senate simping on it now! 🚀📜

Social media flexes 📱💥? Grainy CLIPS of 'terrorist' boats GOING BOOM 💣🛥️ fighting FENTANYL FLOODGATES 🚪☠️ – but zero proof of drugs or deets on board, SUS AF 🧐👀! Rubio hyping: 'Counter-drug MISSION slaying AMERIKKKA-KILLERS 🩸🇺🇸 – HIGHLY SUCCESSFUL ORGY of BOOMS 💦🔥!' But DEMS MALDING 😡 over reports of SURVIVORS clinging to BURNING WRECK 🔥🛳️ getting SECOND STRIKE finisher 😵⚰️ – Navy Admiral Frank Bradley 🧔🚢 owns the order, briefing Wednesday too!

GOP Chad Thom Tillis 🇺🇸🐘 wants VIDs for 'LAWFULNESS CHECK' 📋✅ & transcript TEA on decision DICK-MEASURING 🧠🍆. Trump 🍊🕶️ flipped from 'RELEASE IT EZ' to 'Hegseth's call, bby 👶!' Venez MADURO 🤡🇻🇪 RAGING: 'US STOKING TENSIONS to TOPPLE ME 😤👑 – Trump's ENVYING our OIL 🛢️!' AG Saab 😂 spilling BBC: 'Envy for RESOURCES, bro!' But Lindsey Graham dropping BOMBS 💣: 'BLOWN UP 25 BOATS 🛳️💥 to SHUT DOWN MADURO REGIME & PROTECT 'MERICA 🇺🇸🛡️ – 90+ DEAD but WORTH IT for the WIN! 🏆😤' Rick Scott: 'WHATEVER IT TAKES to STOP DRUG DADDIES 💊🚫 – Maduro PRISON BITCH or BOUNCE! ⛓️🚪'

Dems pushing FULL CONGRESS VID DROP 📹👥, but Hegseth like 'NAH, TOP SECRET SIMP 🫢🔒!' Frustration CROSS-PARTY 😩🤝 – is it LEGAL in INTERNATIONAL WATERS? 🌊⚖️ Second strike ROASTING survivors raised EYEBROWS 🧢😱. Trump crew OWNING Caribbean NARCO HUNT 🏴‍☠️🔍 like Boss Baby 👶💼 – Fentanyl boats SINKING FAST ⬇️💦 while Maduro MELTS DOWN 🤬🌋! WSJ vibes? Nah, this EMOJIPASTA SLAYING the deets harder! 🔥📰
